data.title: Ripple CEO on SEC case: ‘We’re closing this chapter once and for all’
data.description:
Blockchain firm Ripple is moving to formally conclude its long-running legal battle with the Securities Exchange Commission (SEC) following a series of recent setbacks. CEO Brad Garlinghouse confirmed that Ripple is dropping its cross-appeal, with the SEC expected to do the same, effectively bringing the case to a close, he said in an X post on June 28. “Ripple is dropping our cross appeal, and the SEC is expected to drop their appeal, as they’ve previously said. We’re closing this chapter once and for all, and focusing on what’s most important – building the Internet of Value
source: https://finbold.com/ripple-ceo-on-sec-case-were-closing-this-chapter-once-and-for-all/

data.title: Solana ETFs Gain Steam—And Meme Coins Might Ride the Wave
data.description:
"Solana exchange-traded funds (ETFs) are gaining significant traction in the market, indicating a growing interest and investment in this blockchain technology. As these ETFs attract more attention and capital, it is likely that meme coins—cryptocurrencies that have gained popularity primarily through social media and internet culture—could also benefit from this momentum and experience an increase in popularity and value as a result."
source: https://blocknews.com/solana-etfs-gain-steam-and-meme-coins-might-ride-the-wave/

data.title: Seamless Protocol Review: Building the Trustless, Efficient Future of DeFi
data.description:
Seamless Protocol represents a transformative approach to decentralized finance, redefining money markets through advanced lending and borrowing infrastructure. Operating natively on Base Layer 2, it combines community governance with capital-efficient design to deliver secure, accessible DeFi services. What is Seamless Protocol? A Decentralized Lending Platform Seamless Protocol is a DeFi lending and borrowing protocol operating.
source: https://crypto-economy.com/seamless-protocol/

data.title: Bitdeer: Total Bitcoin holdings have increased to over 1,486
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer released the latest Bitcoin holdings data on the X platform. As of June 27, its total Bitcoin holdings have increased to 1,486.1 (Note: This number is pure holdings, excluding Bitcoin deposited by customers). In addition, its Bitcoin mining output this week was 48.3 BTC, but 7.8 BTC were sold.

For details, please refer to: "Hand in hand with you to participate in the latest TG mini-game Pengu Clash of Fat Penguins"

data.title: Vitalik Buterin commented on the dual governance mechanism to solve important problems and emphasized the importance of Ethereum user participation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Vitalik Buterin X platform tweeted that although the dual governance mechanism is not perfect, it solves important problems. Vitalik pointed out that dual governance provides an additional independent layer of defense to prevent the system from taking particularly harmful actions, while explicitly incorporating Ethereum users as stakeholders, rather than relying solely on informal "atmosphere"-based "alignment" methods.

data.title: XRP Breaks Higher After Ripple Drops SEC Appeal, but What’s Next?
data.description:
XRP surged over 3% as Ripple drops its appeal against the SEC, signaling the end of a multi-year legal battle.

The post XRP Breaks Higher After Ripple Drops SEC Appeal, but What’s Next? first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/06/28/xrp-breaks-higher-sec-appeal-drop-next/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=xrp-breaks-higher-sec-appeal-drop-next

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Discusses Dual Governance in Ethereum
data.description: According to Foresight News, Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has expressed that while dual governance is not without flaws, it addresses significant issues. He highlighted that dual governance offers an additional independent layer of defense to prevent the system from taking particularly harmful actions. Furthermore, it ensures that Ethereum users are involved as stakeholders, rather than relying solely on informal, "vibe-based" consensus.

data.title: Bitcoin Treasury, a listed company, has completed the initial phase of its Bitcoin holdings plan and currently holds 771.37 Bitcoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitcoin Treasury Corporation, a Canadian listed company, announced that the initial phase of its Bitcoin holdings plan has been completed. The company acquired 478.57 Bitcoins for a total price of 70 million Canadian dollars (about 51.16 million US dollars). Currently, the company holds 771.37 Bitcoins on its balance sheet. The company will continue to increase its holdings of Bitcoin in the future.

data.title: Gemini Brings Michael Saylor’s Strategy Onchain for European Investors
data.description:

The announcement marks a major milestone for the cultural token platform, which has attracted over 33,000 users since its alpha […]

data.title: Differences Between Investing in Bitcoin and Its ETFs
data.description:
TL;DR Bitcoin ETFs simplify investing by shouldering operational responsibilities, while buying BTC outright grants full asset control and custody. BTC trades 24/7 on crypto exchanges with variable liquidity and trading fees; ETFs, however, trade during standard market hours and usually offer tighter spreads. Direct BTC purchases require investors to safeguard private keys and navigate uncertain.
source: https://crypto-economy.com/differences-between-investing-in-etfs-and-buying-btc-directly/
